payload.title: Dangerous Default Detected: CORS all origins wildcard
payload.description: Wildcard CORS header allows any origin to read responses. Found in 'docs\superpowers\plans\2026-03-30-plan2-blackbox-tier1.md' at line 246.
payload.recommendation: Fix 'CORS all origins wildcard': disable debug mode in production, restrict allowed hosts, and use strong, randomly-generated secret keys.

payload.title: Insecure Cryptography: MD5 used for hashing
payload.description: MD5 is cryptographically broken and should not be used for password hashing or integrity checks. Found in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_insecure_crypto.py' at line 18.
payload.evidence: tests\plugins\whitebox\test_insecure_crypto.py:18: """hashlib.md5() in source code is flagged as HIGH."""
payload.recommendation: Replace with secure alternatives: bcrypt/argon2 for passwords, secrets module for tokens, AES-GCM for encryption.

payload.title: Insecure Cryptography: MD5 used for hashing
payload.description: MD5 is cryptographically broken and should not be used for password hashing or integrity checks. Found in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_insecure_crypto.py' at line 22.
payload.recommendation: Replace with secure alternatives: bcrypt/argon2 for passwords, secrets module for tokens, AES-GCM for encryption.

payload.title: Insecure Cryptography: SHA-1 used for hashing
payload.description: SHA-1 is deprecated and collision-prone; use SHA-256 or higher. Found in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_insecure_crypto.py' at line 64.
payload.recommendation: Replace with secure alternatives: bcrypt/argon2 for passwords, secrets module for tokens, AES-GCM for encryption.

payload.title: Insecure JWT Usage: JWT signature verification disabled (verify=False)
payload.description: Disabling JWT verification allows forged tokens to be accepted. Found in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_insecure_jwt.py' at line 21.
payload.recommendation: Always verify JWT signatures, specify allowed algorithms explicitly, and store secrets in environment variables.

payload.title: Insecure JWT Usage: JWT 'none' algorithm
payload.description: The 'none' algorithm disables JWT signing entirely. Found in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_insecure_jwt.py' at line 63.
payload.recommendation: Always verify JWT signatures, specify allowed algorithms explicitly, and store secrets in environment variables.

payload.title: Insecure JWT Usage: Hardcoded JWT secret
payload.description: Hardcoded JWT secrets can be discovered and used to forge tokens. Found in 'vibee_hacker\core\agent_scanner.py' at line 46.
payload.recommendation: Always verify JWT signatures, specify allowed algorithms explicitly, and store secrets in environment variables.

payload.title: Log Injection Risk: User input in Python logger (f-string)
payload.description: User-controlled data appears to be logged without sanitization in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_log_injection.py' at line 22. Attackers can inject fake log entries or exploit log parsers.
payload.recommendation: Sanitize or encode user input before logging. Replace newlines (\n, \r) and other control characters. Use structured logging with separate fields for user data.

payload.title: Log Injection Risk: User input directly passed to Python logger
payload.description: User-controlled data appears to be logged without sanitization in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_log_injection.py' at line 65. Attackers can inject fake log entries or exploit log parsers.
payload.recommendation: Sanitize or encode user input before logging. Replace newlines (\n, \r) and other control characters. Use structured logging with separate fields for user data.

payload.title: Potential SSRF: HTTP Client Called with Variable URL
payload.description: An HTTP client function is called with a non-literal URL argument in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_py_ssrf_pattern.py' at line 15. If the URL is user-controlled, this is an SSRF vulnerability.
payload.evidence: tests\plugins\whitebox\test_py_ssrf_pattern.py:15: """requests.get(user_url) with variable argument is flagged as CRITICAL."""
payload.recommendation: Validate and allowlist URLs before making outbound HTTP requests. Never pass raw user input to HTTP client functions.

payload.title: NoSQL Injection Pattern: $gt operator in query
payload.description: Potential NoSQL injection pattern '$gt operator in query' detected in 'vibee_hacker\plugins\blackbox\nosql_injection.py' at line 17. MongoDB operators in user-controlled input can bypass authentication.
payload.recommendation: Validate and sanitize all user inputs before using them in NoSQL queries. Use schema validation (e.g., Mongoose) and reject input containing MongoDB operators.

payload.title: TOCTOU Race Condition: os.path.exists() + open()
payload.description: TOCTOU race condition detected in 'tests\plugins\whitebox\test_wb_race_condition.py' at line 15. Checking file existence then opening it is a race condition.
payload.recommendation: Open the file directly and handle FileNotFoundError/IOError instead of checking existence first. This eliminates the TOCTOU window.

payload.title: No USER directive found — container runs as root by default
payload.description: Without a USER directive Docker defaults to root which increases attack surface. In 'vibee_hacker\plugins\whitebox\dockerfile_check.py'.
payload.recommendation: Add `USER nonroot` or a dedicated application user before the CMD/ENTRYPOINT.
